title: Sour Creamy Smoke Miso Stir-fry
description: This romantic Japanese dish features a blend of sour cream, miso paste, and smoked flavors with the addition of dried cranberries for added depth and sweetness.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of sour cream
ingredients.notes: Use full-fat sour cream for richer flavor.

ingredients.name: 4 oz smoked salmon fillets
ingredients.notes: Optional, use smoked tuna or other seafood if preferred.

ingredients.name: A few slices of smoked salmon for garnish (optional)

instructions: Melt the miso paste in a small saucepan with 1/4 cup of water until smooth and slightly thickened.
In a large skillet or wok, heat some oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced onions and minced garlic; sauté for about 3 minutes until they are translucent and fragrant.
Stir in the melted miso mixture and dried cranberries, along with the sour cream. Bring to a simmer and let it cook for another minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Increase heat to high, add sliced salmon (if using) and stir occasionally until just cooked through, about 1-2 minutes per side if desired.
Add spinach leaves towards the end of cooking; toss them in the miso mixture to wilt slightly. Serve hot with extra dried cranberries and garnished with slices of smoked salmon if used.
Enjoy your hearty and aromatic dish as a satisfying dinner option.
